label: 361_eu participants_participants discussed_financial regulatory_regulatory forum
description: The U.S. and EU held regular meetings in Washington, D.C., Brussels, and later online to discuss financial regulations, involving representatives from the European Commission and the U.S. Department of the Treasury.

earliest_articles.title: Readout of Meeting between U.S. Secretary of the Treasury Tim Geithner and European Commissioner Michel Barnier
earliest_articles.excerpt: (Archived Content) TG-695 U.S. Treasury Secretary Timothy Geithner and European Commissioner Michel Barnier met today and reaffirmed their strong determination to cooperate closely in strengthening the global financial system and in putting in place the G-20 financial reform agenda. earliest_articles.title: Remarks by Charles Collyns
earliest_articles.excerpt: Commission to fully implement the Services Directive. A more harmonized services sector, and a deeper Single Market, could speed up the removal of the bottlenecks that hamper investment and productivity, and dampen Europe's growth potential. earliest_articles.title: U.S.-EU Financial Markets Regulatory Dialogue Joint Statement
earliest_articles.excerpt: (Archived Content) BRUSSELS – On July 8, 2014, participants from the United States and the European Union held a meeting of their Financial Markets Regulatory Dialogue (FMRD). They met to exchange information on regulatory developments as part of their ongoing dialogue, and discuss their shared interests in continuing…

newest_articles.title: U.S.-UK Financial Regulatory Working Group Winter 2026: Joint Statement
newest_articles.excerpt: The 12th official meeting of the U.S.-UK Financial Regulatory Working Group (Working Group) was hosted by the U.S. Department of the Treasury in Washington, DC on February 25, 2026. newest_articles.title: U.S.-UK Transatlantic Taskforce for Markets of the Future Hosts Industry Engagement Day in London
newest_articles.excerpt: HM Treasury hosted representatives from U.S. Treasury and regulatory agencies in London on January 26, 2026, to conduct joint senior-level industry engagement for the Transatlantic Taskforce for Markets of the Future established last September. newest_articles.title: Joint Statement on the EU-U.S. Joint Financial Regulatory Forum
newest_articles.excerpt: WASHINGTON - The EU-U.S. Joint Financial Regulatory Forum took place on 9-10 December 2025, with participants exchanging views on topics of mutual interest as part of their regular financial regulatory dialogue.
